title: Great Job
pros: Watch Commander Loved every second of it. Every day I was able to come to work as my best slef because of all the sacrifices the administration made for the team. Fantastic place to start my career.

title: Family Dynamic
pros: Customer Service Representative Fremont, CA Netflix was the best company you could ever work for! title: Productive and safe environment

title: Good company when work is available
pros: Rigger New Mexico When times  are good it’s a great studio to work for, but work can be scarce. All in all it’s been a positive experience and there have been several shows over the past five or six years, but things have really slowed down.
